name: Creamy Peach Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen, unsweetened peach slices (partially thawed)
1/8 to 1/4 teaspoon freshly grated nutmeg to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse the peaches in a food processor or blender until chopped.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend until creamy.
3. Serve immediately or store in the freezer until serving time.
4. Yield: 4 servings (Other frozen fruits may be substituted for the peaches.)
